direct:
Direct Proof

Assume P.

...

Therefore Q.

Hence P ⇒ Q.
contrapositive:
Proof by Contraposition

Assume ¬Q.

...

Therefore ¬P.

Hence P ⇒ Q.
contradiction:
Proof by Contradiction

Assume ¬P.

...

Obtain a contradiction.

Therefore P.
cases:
Proof by Cases

Case 1:

...

Case 2:

...

Since all possible cases have been exhausted, the statement holds.
biconditional:
Biconditional Proof

(⇒)
Assume P.

...

Therefore Q.

(⇐)
Assume Q.

...

Therefore P.

Hence P ⇔ Q.
forall:
Universal Proof

Let x be an arbitrary element of the universe.

...

Therefore P(x).

Hence ∀x P(x).
exists:
Existence Proof

Choose x = ____.

...

Therefore P(x).

Hence ∃x P(x).
exists_unique:
Existence and Uniqueness Proof

Existence:
Choose x = ____.

...

Uniqueness:
Suppose y also satisfies the property.

...

Therefore y = x.

Hence ∃!x P(x).
divisibility:
Divisibility Proof

Let a,b ∈ ℤ.

Assume a divides b.

Then there exists k ∈ ℤ such that

b = ak.

...

Therefore a divides ____.
induction:
Proof by Induction

Base Case:

...

Inductive Hypothesis:
Assume P(n).

Inductive Step:
Show P(n+1).

...

Therefore P(n) is true for all n.
